baseline.name: single-condition API migration regression testing baseline
baseline.description: Evaluate one fixed condition without the proposed diagnostic comparison.

modules.name: controlled comparison
modules.purpose: Compare conditions using regression pass rate.

problem_method_insight: API migration regression testing should be evaluated by separating data quality from system behavior.
falsifiable_hypothesis: The proposed comparison improves regression pass rate by at least 0.05 over the baseline; a smaller gain falsifies the hypothesis.

minimum_key_experiment.name: minimum API migration regression testing comparison
minimum_key_experiment.success_threshold: proposed regression pass rate - baseline regression pass rate >= 0.05

stop_conditions: The evaluation set has fewer than 30 independent examples
